import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut count0 = 0
  mut count1 = 0
  mut count2 = 0
  mut count3 = 0
  mut count4 = 0
  mut count5 = 0
  mut count6 = 0
  mut count7 = 0
  mut count8 = 0
  mut count9 = 0

  mut i = 0
  let len = string.len(line)
  while i < len
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 48
        count0 = count0 + 1
      else if b == 49
        count1 = count1 + 1
      else if b == 50
        count2 = count2 + 1
      else if b == 51
        count3 = count3 + 1
      else if b == 52
        count4 = count4 + 1
      else if b == 53
        count5 = count5 + 1
      else if b == 54
        count6 = count6 + 1
      else if b == 55
        count7 = count7 + 1
      else if b == 56
        count8 = count8 + 1
      else if b == 57
        count9 = count9 + 1
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print_bar("0", count0)
  print_bar("1", count1)
  print_bar("2", count2)
  print_bar("3", count3)
  print_bar("4", count4)
  print_bar("5", count5)
  print_bar("6", count6)
  print_bar("7", count7)
  print_bar("8", count8)
  print_bar("9", count9)
end

fn print_bar(_ digit: String, _ count: Int) -> Unit
  mut hashes = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    hashes = "#{hashes}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  print("#{digit}: #{hashes}")
end
